channel.title: GitHub ShaderLab Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of ShaderLab in GitHub

item.title: mob-sakai/SoftMaskForUGUI
item.description: Enhance Unity UI (uGUI) with advanced soft-masking features to create more visually appealing effects!

item.title: shinyflvre/Mate-Engine
item.description: A free Desktop Mate alternative with a lightweight interface and custom VRM support, though with more features.
